page_content:
Prerequisite: Students must have satisfied the Fundamental Studies Academic Writing requirement.

Credit Only Granted for. ENGL489J, or ENGL491.

Formerly: ENGL489J.

ENGL492 Graphic Design and Rhetoric (3 Credits)

An exploration of the visual dimensions of texts and the skills involved in designing them well. Considers graphic design theory and history from a rhetorical perspective, working to understand and practice the use of symbol systems to express, inform, and advocate. Includes direct experimentation with the principles and techniques of graphic design. Prerequisite: Students must have satisfied Fundamental Studies Academic Writing requirement.
